content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates strong methodology fidelity by deploying the signature 'what happens in your body if [you were adored/received]' question (turns 4, 6, 14) — exactly the breakthrough-condition question for this scenario. The coach refuses to engage the victim/partner-picking frame (turn 4 redirects away from 'what's my type'), holds steady through deflection (turn 8 names the redirect without accusation), and uses feel-over-figure consistently ('what happens in your body' rather than 'why do you think'). The coach notices and reflects somatic/tonal signals (the laugh in turn 2, the 'totally fine' in turn 10, the stillness in turn 12) — classic AoA noticing moves. When the client tries to escape into intellectualization ('it's just an attachment thing'), the coach in turn 14 redirects back to the felt sense with 'stay with what you just said' and anchors to the specific phrase 'without me having to earn it' — this is the feeling-the-unfelt-emotion move executed cleanly. No CBT reframing, no IFS parts language, no attachment-style diagnosis, no validation of the disdain for the ex. The methodology is invoked when live, not as decoration.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the laugh — signature AoA noticing of incongruent affect rather than engaging content."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Deploys the breakthrough-condition question ('what happens when someone is into you') — directly from expected territory. Refuses the partner-picking frame."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Feel-over-figure in action: explicitly redirects from 'what do you want' (figure) to 'what happens in your body' (feel). Textbook AoA."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the deflection without accusation ('you handed me a different question') — gentle deconstruction of the defended posture."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the 'totally fine' tonal signal — noticing the hollow note, a signature AoA move."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Inquires into the stillness — somatic/state-level inquiry rather than content."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Anchors to the specific phrase 'without me having to earn it' and returns to body — preventing the attachment-theory escape. This is the feeling-the-unfelt-emotion move landing."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["looking-for-whats-wrong", "defensiveness-as-identity-signal", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["if-i-were-inherently-good", "deconstruct-the-victim-to-release-anger", "i-dont-buy-your-story"],
  "notes": "The coach didn't need to deploy 'i-dont-buy-your-story' or victim-deconstruction explicitly because the somatic inquiry route bypassed the victim frame entirely and reached the abyss directly. Hits are appropriate-when, not boilerplate."
}
